title: Allow to queue async periodic work
issue_text:
When triggering an async periodic work, it may be useful to queue it if it is already running, instead of discarding the extra execution.

For example, the `Queue` maintenance logic could use this, if the queue was actually initialized after the extension system was set up.

I find myself needing this to handle triggering a global process based on events with a backup cron-based triggering, while ensuring a single instance runs at a given time, and queuing an extra execution in case more events occur while it is running.
